history.content: Need to get need to let my lawyer know that there's been a development in my divorce.
What is the nature of the development in your divorce?
Turns out, she's been hiding financial documents for years.
What specific financial documents are you referring to?
Prenups postnup and retirement accounts that are in my name but I never opened. But she did
What steps have you taken to address this issue with your spouse?
I have not told her yet. I want to go to Illegal channels, channels. Only,
What illegal channels are you considering?
Sorry, I said legal channels. I want to go through lawyers.
What specific assistance do you need from your lawyer regarding this situation?
He hadn't to contact her lawyer to address this.
What is your preferred method of communication for your lawyer to reach out to the other party's attorney?
Either by sending documents through mail or email.
What is the most important document you want your lawyer to prioritize when contacting the other party's attorney?
I don't know. I need none of them are 1 above the other, but I guess if I had to say, it would be the retirement accounts.
What specific concerns do you have about the retirement accounts that you would like your lawyer to address?
She used my identity without my consent and is now trying trying to take all the money in there and I want a piece of the pie.
What evidence do you have to support your claim about the unauthorized use of your identity regarding the retirement accounts?
My sign. The signature is not my signature but it is my Social Security.
What steps have you already taken to gather evidence or documentation regarding the fraudulent use of your signature?
I've already taking pictures of the documents that exist and my original handwriting, and I'm sending it to him to the lawyer. After this,
What is your timeline for sending the evidence to your lawyer?
If I had to say, um, it's going to be immediately after this call.
What additional information or context do you think your lawyer should know when you send the documents?
Really nothing. This is all I really need to say.
What is your preferred contact information for your lawyer to reach you after you send the documents?
Uh, the number I'm calling on right now is perfectly fine.
What is the nature of the development in your divorce?
Have a good  day, bye.
What is the nature of the development in your divorce?
I need to let my lawyer know, there's been a development in my work comp.
What is the nature of the development in your workers' compensation case?
They, they're trying to send me money saying. Yeah, yeah, here's the settlement money, but we haven't gotten into any court yet and I don't want to accept this money until we go to court.
What is your main concern about accepting the settlement money before going to court?
I don't want them to use it against me in court. I'm nervous.
What specific outcome are you hoping to achieve in court regarding your workers' compensation case?
To squeeze them for as much money as possible.
What is your preferred method of communication for your lawyer to reach you regarding this issue?
This number that I'm calling on is fine.
What is the nature of the development in your workers' compensation case?
